prompt:
{
  "type": "character portrait grid",
  "theme": "{argument name=\"theme\" default=\"Game of Thrones characters\"}",
  "style": "{argument name=\"art style\" default=\"2D flat illustration, clean line art, comic style, profile view facing right, pale skin with blush\"}",
  "layout": {
    "grid": "3x3",
    "background": "light gray textured",
    "frame_style": "white rounded-rectangle frames with text labels below each"
  },
  "count": 9,
  "portraits": [
    { "label": "Jon Snow", "description": "black hair half-up, beard, dark fur cloak" },
    { "label": "Daenerys Targaryen", "description": "silver braided hair, blue dress" },
    { "label": "Tyrion Lannister", "description": "curly brown hair, beard, dark tunic with gold pin" },
    { "label": "Cersei Lannister", "description": "blonde braided hair, ornate red and gold dress" },
    { "label": "Ned Stark", "description": "brown hair half-up, beard, dark fur cloak" },
    { "label": "Arya Stark", "description": "short dark hair half-up, brown tunic, sword hilt" },
    { "label": "Jaime Lannister", "description": "short blonde hair, gold armor with lion motif" },
    { "label": "Sansa Stark", "description": "red braided hair, blue dress with fur collar" },
    { "label": "Theon Greyjoy", "description": "short dark curly hair, dark tunic with kraken pin" }
  ]
}
translatedPrompt:
{
  "type": "角色肖像网格",
  "theme": "{argument name=\"theme\" default=\"权力的游戏角色\"}",
  "style": "{argument name=\"art style\" default=\"2D 平面插画，简洁线条，漫画风格，侧脸向右，肤色白皙带腮红\"}",
  "layout": {
    "grid": "3x3",
    "background": "浅灰色纹理",
    "frame_style": "白色圆角矩形边框，下方带有文字标签"
  },
  "count": 9,
  "portraits": [
    { "label": "Jon Snow", "description": "黑色半扎发，胡须，深色毛皮斗篷" },
    { "label": "Daenerys Targaryen", "description": "银色编发，蓝色连衣裙" },
    { "label": "Tyrion Lannister", "description": "棕色卷发，胡须，深色束腰外衣配金色别针" },
    { "label": "Cersei Lannister", "description": "金色编发，华丽的红金配色连衣裙" },
    { "label": "Ned Stark", "description": "棕色半扎发，胡须，深色毛皮斗篷" },
    { "label": "Arya Stark", "description": "深色短半扎发，棕色束腰外衣，剑柄" },
    { "label": "Jaime Lannister", "description": "金色短发，带有狮子图案的金色盔甲" },
    { "label": "Sansa Stark", "description": "红色编发，带有毛皮领的蓝色连衣裙" },
    { "label": "Theon Greyjoy", "description": "深色短卷发，带有海怪别针的深色束腰外衣" }
  ]
}

breakdown.creativeCore: 3x3 角色肖像网格：生成一个 3x3 的插画风格角色头像网格，并附带名称标签，非常适合用于角色阵容展示或头像集。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: grid]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
